| [3](BBE.md#v3) | There were the arrows of the bow broken, there he put an end to body-cover, sword, and fight. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | You are shining and full of glory, more than the eternal mountains. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Gone is the wealth of the strong, their last sleep has overcome them; the men of war have become feeble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | At the voice of your wrath, O God of Jacob, deep sleep has overcome carriage and horse. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | You, you are to be feared; who may keep his place before you in the time of your wrath? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | From heaven you gave your decision; the earth, in its fear, gave no sound, | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | When God took his place as judge, for the salvation of the poor on the earth. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The ... will give you praise; the rest of ... | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Give to the Lord your God what is his by right; let all who are round him give offerings to him who is to be feared. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | He puts an end to the wrath of rulers; he is feared by the kings of the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
